detaileddescription.para: Number of voxels. If > 1, set flag for LSODA to handle molecule flux on each timestep during diffusion, which slows it down.

Cinit_ specifies initial conc at t = 0. Whenever the reac system is rebuilt or reinited, all S_ values become set to Cinit. scaled for volume and NA. Also used for buffered molecules as the fixed values of these molecules.
Looks up comptIndex from compt. Actually just a set would do.
proxyPoolVoxels_[comptIndex][#] Used to build the transfer vector. Stores the voxels of proxy pools in specified compartment,

proxyTransferIndex_[comptIndex][#] Stores the index in the transfer vector for proxy pools that live on this voxel. The poolIndex and # of pools is known from the xferPoolIdx_ vector stored on the Ksolve.
S_ is the array of molecules. Stored as n, number of molecules per mesh entry. The poolIndex specifies which molecular species pool to use.

The first numVarPools_ in the poolIndex are state variables and are integrated using the ODE solver or the GSSA solver. The next numBufPools_ are fixed but can be changed by the script. The next numFuncPools_ are computed using arbitrary functions of any of the molecule levels, and the time. The functions evaluate before the solver. The functions should not cascade as there is no guarantee of execution order.
This is what I would need to fully identify proxy compts and voxels for each proxy reac. vector< Id, Id, unsigned int, unsigned int> proxyComptVoxel Volume of voxel.
xReacScaleProducts_[crossRateTermIndex] Product of productVol/voxelVol for each of the products, for reverse reacs. Applied to R2 of the RateTerm. Used only for cross reactions.
xReacScaleSubstrates_[crossRateTermIndex] Product of substrateVol/voxelVol for each of the substrates, for forward reacs. Applied to R1 of the RateTerm. Used only for cross reactions.

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int comptIndex, Id comptId, unsigned int voxel)
memberdef.name: addProxyVoxy

briefdescription.para: Adds the index of a voxel to which proxy data should go.

detaileddescription.para: Multiply in scale factor for different cross-reac volumes, to be applied to specified RateTerm in the rates_ vector. Applies to backward reaction terms
Returns the array of doubles of initial mol #s at the specified mesh index

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< Id > &offSolverReacs, const vector< pair< Id, Id > > &offSolverReacCompts)
memberdef.name: filterCrossRateTerms

detaileddescription.para: Changes cross rate terms to zero if there is no junction
Zeroes out rate terms that are involved in cross-reactions that are not present on current voxel.
Multiply in scale factor for different cross-reac volumes, to be applied to specified RateTerm in the rates_ vector. Applies to forward reaction terms

briefdescription.para: Return the volume of the voxel.

detaileddescription.para: Return scale factor for specified entry on rate terms. Index is # of cross-compartment rate term.
Return scale factor for specified entry on rate terms. Index is # of cross-compartment rate term.

briefdescription.para: True when this voxel has data to be transferred.

detaileddescription.para: Assigns the Id and volume of the specified x-reac coupled compartment void setComptVolume( unsigned int comptIndex, Id id, double vol );
True when there is a junction. i1 must match, and if i2 is non-zero then it too must match.
Assigns S = NA * vol * Cinit and sets up initial dt.
Initialize/reset the vector xReacScaling_ for scale factors for each cross reaction in this voxel.
Using the computed array sizes, now allocate space for them.
Returns the array of doubles of current mol #s at the specified mesh index

briefdescription.para: Just assigns the volume without any cascading to other values.

detaileddescription.para: Assign the volume, and handle the cascading effects by scaling all the dependent values of n.
Returns # of pools

briefdescription.para: Returns a handle to the mol # vector.

detaileddescription.para: Reassign entire rate vector.

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< RateTerm * > &rates, unsigned int numCoreRates, unsigned int index)=0
memberdef.name: updateRateTerms

detaileddescription.para: Update specified index on rate terms. The entire rates vector is passed in for the source values, the index specifies which entry on the local rate vector is to be updated.
Returns the array of doubles of initial mol #s at the specified mesh index, as a writable array.
Returns the array of doubles of current mol #s at the specified mesh index. Dangerous, allows one to modify the values.

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< unsigned int > &poolIndex, const vector< double > &values, const vector< double > &lastValues, unsigned int voxelIndex)
memberdef.name: xferIn

detaileddescription.para: Digests incoming data values for cross-compt reactions. Sums the changes in the values onto the specified pools.

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< unsigned int > &poolIndex, const vector< double > &values, unsigned int numProxyPools, unsigned int voxelIndex)
memberdef.name: xferInOnlyProxies

detaileddescription.para: Used during initialization: Takes only the proxy pool values from the incoming transfer data, and assigns it to the proxy pools on current solver

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int voxelIndex, vector< double > &values, const vector< unsigned int > &poolIndex)
memberdef.name: xferOut

briefdescription.para: Assembles data values for sending out for x-compt reacs.

detaileddescription.para: This is the base class for voxels used in reac-diffusion systems. Each voxel manages all the molecular pools that live in it. This is the S_ and Cinit_ vectors. Additionally, the last set of entries in S_ and Cinit_ refer to the proxy pools that participate in cross-node reactions, but are really located on other compartments.
